scripts.readme:demo:zh: python3 scripts/build_readme_demo.py --input docs/assets/beacon-home-android-zh-CN.png --frames-dir docs/assets/.readme-demo-frames-zh-CN --mp4 docs/assets/beacon-demo-hero-zh-CN.mp4 --gif docs/assets/beacon-demo-hero-zh-CN.gif --poster docs/assets/beacon-demo-hero-zh-CN-poster.png

scripts.readme:demo:fr: python3 scripts/build_readme_demo.py --locale fr --input docs/assets/beacon-home-android-fr.png --frames-dir docs/assets/.readme-demo-frames-fr --mp4 docs/assets/beacon-demo-hero-fr.mp4 --gif docs/assets/beacon-demo-hero-fr.gif --poster docs/assets/beacon-demo-hero-fr-poster.png

scripts.readme:demo:all-locales: npm run readme:demo && npm run readme:demo:zh && npm run readme:demo:zh-tw && npm run readme:demo:ja && npm run readme:demo:ko && npm run readme:demo:es && npm run readme:demo:fr && npm run readme:demo:de && npm run readme:demo:pt && npm run readme:demo:ar
scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && cap sync && node scripts/ensure_android_generated_build.mjs && node scripts/ensure_ios_plugin_registration.mjs
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:build && cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:build && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android:release: npm run mobile:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./gradlew assembleRelease bundleRelease -PbeaconBundleGemmaInApk=false
scripts.mobile:android:release:github: npm run mobile:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./gradlew assembleRelease -PbeaconBundleGemmaInApk=false -PbeaconArm64Only=true
scripts.mobile:android:release:bundled: npm run mobile:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./gradlew assembleRelease -PbeaconBundleGemmaInApk=true -PbeaconArm64Only=true
